# terrible_community_general_gitlab_milestone (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `group` (String) The path of the group. Either this or `project` is required.
- `milestones` (String) A list of dictionaries that represents gitlab project's or group's milestones.
- `project` (String) The path and name of the project. Either this or `group` is required.
- `purge` (Boolean) When set to `true`, delete all milestone which are not mentioned in the task.
- `state` (String) Create or delete milestone.

### Read-Only

- `milestones_obj` (String) API object.
